title: Health Protection Report volume 19 (2025)
body: "The Health Protection Report (HPR) comprises:    routine reports on infections (microbiological and epidemiological data and associated commentary)   reports from UKHSA’s Environmental Health Protection Surveillance System   a digest of news on infections and other health protection topics    For a full listing of the most recently published HPR surveillance reports, see latest infection reports.   Subscribe to weekly email alerts.   Contact  The HPR editorial team: john.manos@ukhsa.gov.uk  Archives  Access:    HPR Volume 18 (2024)   HPR Volume 17 (2023)   HPR Volume 16 (2022)   HPR Volume 15 (2021)   HPR Volume 14 (2020)   HPR Volume 13 (2019)   HPR Volume 12 (2018)   HPR Volume 11 (2017)   HPR Volume 10 (2016)   HPR Volume 9 (2015)   HPR Volume 8 (2014)   HPR Volumes 1 to 7 (2007 to 2013)   CDR Weekly Volumes 1 to 16 (1991 to 2006), the predecessor to HPR     CDPH Volumes 1 to 7 (1998 to 2004, partial archive) and CDR Review (1991 to 1997), the predecessor to CDPH (within the CDR Archives referred to above)    "
